# EverBee Store App

> An app built on the EverBee Store platform. Agent-friendly: the full API is
> described in OpenAPI and wrapped by an MCP server so an LLM can drive it.

Static fallback for split deploys. On Fly single-origin deploys the backend
serves this dynamically (with the live endpoint list) at /llms.txt.

## Machine interfaces
- OpenAPI contract: /openapi.json
- API docs (Swagger): /docs
- Release notes: /api/release-notes
- MCP server: see the app's /mcp package

## Auth
POST /api/auth/login → { accessToken }. Send Authorization: Bearer <token>.
